impacts.statement: Major flooding of farm and agricultural land is occurring. Hundreds of thousands acres of land are underwater.
Extensive flooding of farm and agricultural land is occurring.
Widespread flooding of farm and agricultural land is occurring. Several thousand acres are inundated.
Minor overbank flooding is occurring along and near the river.

dataAttribution.title: Observations courtesy of U.S. Army Corps of Engineers

hydronotes.statement: River forecasts for this location take into account past precipitation and the precipitation amounts expected approximately 24 hours into the future from the forecast issuance time.
